jaghun_allocations: Jaghun 1: Prioritize and triage incoming emails for urgency and importance.
Jaghun 2: Gather necessary information and context for drafting email replies.
Jaghun 3: Draft replies for common customer support inquiries.
Jaghun 4: Draft replies for internal administrative communications.
Jaghun 5: Draft replies for vendor and partner communications.
Jaghun 6: Draft replies for legal and compliance-related emails.
Jaghun 7: Draft replies for human resources and personnel communications.
Jaghun 8: Draft replies for marketing and public relations inquiries.
Jaghun 9: Conduct quality assurance and review of drafted email content.
Jaghun 10: Finalize email drafts and ensure proper archiving.

jaghun_allocations: Jaghun 1: Prioritize and triage incoming emails for urgency and importance.
Jaghun 2: Gather necessary information and context for drafting email replies.
Jaghun 3: Draft replies for common customer support inquiries.
Jaghun 4: Draft replies for internal administrative communications.
Jaghun 5: Draft replies for vendor and partner communications.
Jaghun 6: Draft replies for legal and compliance-related emails.
Jaghun 7: Draft replies for human resources and personnel communications.
Jaghun 8: Draft replies for marketing and public relations inquiries.
Jaghun 9: Conduct quality assurance and review of drafted email content.
Jaghun 10: Finalize email drafts and ensure proper archiving.
